name: Chocolately Chocolate Chip Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon White vinegar -OR- Apple cider vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat cream cheese until fluffy.
2. Gradually beat in sugar.
3. Add egg. Blend until smooth.
4. Stir in flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda and salt.
5. Beat together water, oil, vinegar and vanilla.
6. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry mixture, blending well.
7. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch square baking pan.
8. Drop spoonfuls of cream cheese mixture over the batter.
9. Sprinkle with chocolate pieces and walnuts.
10. Bake at 350°F for 30-50 minutes until a tester comes out clean and the top springs back when touched.
11. Cool on a wire rack.
12. To serve, cut into squares from the pan.
